name: Cranberry Fruit and Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream butter in a large mixing bowl; gradually add sugar, beating well.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg; add to creamed mixture alternately with sour cream, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix just until blended after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Fold in cranberries, chopped pecans, raisins, and dried apricots.
7. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 8 x 4 x 3-inch loaf pans; arrange pecan halves on top.
8. Bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in pans for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
9. Arrange whole cranberries on the loaves.
10. Combine powdered sugar with milk, mixing well; drizzle over the loaves.
Yield: 2 loaves.
